data.title: Meta's AI Research Head Announces Departure After 7 Years As Mark Zuckerberg Doubles Down On AI Investments
data.description: Joelle Pineau, the Vice President of AI research at Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ: META), has decided to step down and leave the company in May.

data.title: Tesla Short Interest Soars To 21.16%, Making It 4th Most Shorted Stock Currently: Here's What Its Charts Indicate
data.description: Tesla's short interest increased by over 21% during its current reporting period, making it the 4th largest shorted stock in the U.S. market.

data.title: Anthony Scaramucci Hates It When Trump Pumps His Own Coin, But Loves The President's Bitcoin Moves — This Complex Crypto Relationship Decoded
data.description: Anthony Scaramucci, an influential cryptocurrency advocate and founder of investment firm SkyBridge Capital, has alternated between supporting President Donald Trump's pro-cryptocurrency pivot and warning of the potential pitfalls of some of his decisions.

data.title: AMC Expands Premium Movie Experience With IMAX Laser Upgrades In Landmark Deal
data.description: AMC Entertainment is enhancing its premium moviegoing experience with IMAX with Laser technology. Under the agreement, AMC will add twelve new IMAX locations and upgrade an additional 68 IMAX locations to IMAX with Laser.

data.title: US Car Buyers Throng Dealerships As Trump's Tariff Threat Looms Over Prices
data.description: In the lead-up to 'Liberation Day' car dealerships in the US are seeing a spike in footfalls, as consumers race to book their new vehicles.
